summary: Iteration 51: Voice Conversations feature for Sage (AI Spiritual Coach) - All tests passed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%) including voice-chat endpoint, text chat regression, session CRUD, and modes. Frontend: All UI elements verified - voice record button visible, text input works, mode selection (6 modes), chat messages display, back navigation functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice Conversations feature fully working. Key data-testid attributes: voice-record-btn (mic button), coach-input (text input), send-message-btn (send button), chat-messages (message area), back-to-list (navigation), mode-{id} (mode selection buttons). 6 coaching modes available: spiritual, life, shadow, manifestation, healing, dream_oracle. Voice endpoint POST /api/coach/voice-chat accepts multipart form with audio file and session_id, returns transcribed_text, reply, and audio_base64.
